title: AI Gear 10-Inch Contour Gauge Shape Copying Tool for DIY, Woodworking, Flooring & Tiling for Marking Around Pipes, Corners & Edges
features: Designed for DIY and home renovation-Helps copy irregular shapes when fitting flooring, tiles, skirting boards, door frames and pipe cut-outs during home projects.
Adjustable pin tension for controlled shape copying-Includes Allen key screws at the ends to tighten or loosen the pins, allowing you to set the gauge to your preferred resistance.
Shape copying for marking before cutting-Traces contours so you can transfer shapes onto wood, laminate, vinyl or tile before cutting.
Practical accuracy for household projects-Supports cleaner fitting by reducing trial-and-error around corners and obstacles.
10-inch / 25.4 cm width-Compact size suitable for most household applications — please check dimensions before ordering.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Measuring & Layout Tools > Marking Tools
